channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Dow tumbles almost 800 points and enters correction, S&P 500 posts fifth straight losing week: Live updates - CNBC

item.description:
1. Why College Graduates Feel Betrayed  The New York Times
  2. The Entry-Level Job Market Stinks. These Grads Are Crushing It.  The Chronicle of Higher Education
  3. How many college grads actually use their degrees? It’s complicated  WGBH
  4. Gen Z faces tough job market as employers report hiring hesitation  WBTV
  5. The entry-level job market is the worst it’s been in 37 years. Stop blaming Gen Z  Fortune
